turn_by_turn_steps.title: Park/start at Orchard Gulch Trail Access Point
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: Start the GPX before leaving the car. The track should begin and end at this parking point.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Start on #7 Orchard Gulch
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: From the car, take #7 Orchard Gulch toward Orchard Gulch Trail. This access trail/road is part of the route even though it is not official challenge credit. Watch for signs: #7 Orchard Gulch.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Take Orchard Gulch Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: Follow Orchard Gulch Trail. This earns: Orchard Gulch Trail segment 1. Section estimate: 1.58 official mi, ~29 min moving, 633 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Five Mile Gulch Trail. Connector also uses: East Shaw Mountain Road. Connector also uses: #26 Three Bears.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Five Mile Gulch Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Five Mile Gulch Trail, turn onto Five Mile Gulch Trail. This earns: Five Mile Gulch Trail segment 1. Section estimate: 1.46 official mi, ~33 min moving, 1194 ft climb. ASCENT REQUIRED on Five Mile Gulch Trail 1. Next decision: look for signs to Five Mile Gulch Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn right onto Five Mile Gulch Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Five Mile Gulch Trail, turn right onto Five Mile Gulch Trail. Use #2 Five Mile Gulch, Five Mile Gulch for 1.07 mi. Look for signs: #2 Five Mile Gulch. This earns: both Five Mile Gulch Trail official segments. Section estimate: 1.92 official mi, ~28 min moving, 157 ft climb, 1068 ft descent. Next decision: look for signs to Watchman Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Watchman Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Watchman Trail, turn onto Watchman Trail. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.75 mi. Look for signs: #26 Three Bears. This earns: Watchman Trail segment 2. Section estimate: 0.76 official mi, ~15 min moving, 417 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Watchman Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Continue onto Watchman Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Watchman Trail, continue straight onto Watchman Trail. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.04 mi. Look for signs: #6 Femrite's Patrol Trail. This earns: Watchman Trail segment 1. Section estimate: 2.71 official mi, ~43 min moving, 778 ft climb.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Return via #2 Five Mile Gulch, #7 Orchard Gulch, East Shaw Mountain Road, Five Mile Gulch, Orchard Gulch
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: After Watchman Trail, you are not fully back at the car. Use #2 Five Mile Gulch, #7 Orchard Gulch, East Shaw Mountain Road, Five Mile Gulch, Orchard Gulch back toward Orchard Gulch Trail Access Point. Expect about 1.96 mi after the final official-credit segment. This return leg is part of the route even though it is not official challenge credit.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Park/start at Hulls Gulch Trailhead
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: Start the GPX before leaving the car. The track should begin and end at this parking point.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Start on #39A Kestrel
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: From the car, take #39A Kestrel toward Lower Hull's Gulch Trail. This access trail/road is part of the route even though it is not official challenge credit. Watch for signs: #39A Kestrel.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Take Lower Hull's Gulch Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: Follow Lower Hull's Gulch Trail. This earns: Lower Hull's Gulch Trail segments 1-5. Section estimate: 2.17 official mi, ~42 min moving, 939 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Hull's Gulch Interpretive. Connector also uses: #4 8th Street Motorcycle. Connector also uses: #39A Kestrel. Connector also uses: #36 Red Fox (Dog On-Leash). Connector also uses: #34 Hull's Pond. Connector also uses: #29 Lower Hull's Gulch. Connector also uses: #39 Connector.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Bear right onto Hull's Gulch Interpretive
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Hull's Gulch Interpretive, bear right onto Hull's Gulch Interpretive. This earns: Hull's Gulch Interpretive segments 1-4. Section estimate: 3.74 official mi, ~73 min moving, 2289 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Hull's Gulch Interpretive.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn right onto Hull's Gulch Interpretive
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Hull's Gulch Interpretive, turn right onto Hull's Gulch Interpretive. Use Hull's Gulch Interpretive Trail for 0.07 mi. This earns: Hull's Gulch Interpretive segment 5. Section estimate: 0.61 official mi, ~10 min moving, 184 ft climb, 611 ft descent. Next decision: look for signs to Hull's Gulch Interpretive.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Continue onto Hull's Gulch Interpretive
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Hull's Gulch Interpretive, continue straight onto Hull's Gulch Interpretive. Use #0 Hull's Gulch Interpretive Trail, Hull's Gulch Interpretive Trail for 1.01 mi. Look for signs: #0 Hull's Gulch Interpretive Trail. This earns: both Hull's Gulch Interpretive official segments. Section estimate: 0.72 official mi, ~13 min moving, 255 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Crestline Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Crestline Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Crestline Trail, turn onto Crestline Trail. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.59 mi. Look for signs: #0 Hull's Gulch Interpretive Trail; #4 8th Street Motorcycle. This earns: Crestline Trail segments 1-4. Section estimate: 1.83 official mi, ~29 min moving, 179 ft climb, 444 ft descent. Next decision: look for signs to Kestral Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Kestral Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Kestral Trail, turn onto Kestral Trail. Use Kestrel for 0.06 mi. This earns: Kestral Trail segment 1. Section estimate: 0.75 official mi, ~12 min moving, 2 ft climb, 260 ft descent. Next decision: look for signs to Owl's Roost.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Bear left onto Owl's Roost
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Owl's Roost, bear left onto Owl's Roost. This earns: Owl's Roost segment 1. Section estimate: 0.64 official mi, ~10 min moving, 8 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Gold Finch.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Continue onto Gold Finch
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Gold Finch, continue straight onto Gold Finch. This earns: both Gold Finch official segments. Section estimate: 0.34 official mi, ~7 min moving, 11 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to 15th St. Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto 15th St. Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with 15th St. Trail, turn onto 15th St. Trail. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.17 mi. Look for signs: #34 Hulls Pond. This earns: 15th St. Trail segment 1. Section estimate: 0.45 official mi, ~11 min moving, 128 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Chickadee Ridge Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Continue onto Chickadee Ridge Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Chickadee Ridge Trail, continue straight onto Chickadee Ridge Trail. Use 15th Street #41, Red Fox (Dog Off-Leash) for 0.48 mi. Look for signs: #41 15th Street. This earns: both Chickadee Ridge Trail official segments. Section estimate: 0.6 official mi, ~10 min moving, 169 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Red Cliffs.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Red Cliffs
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Red Cliffs, turn onto Red Cliffs. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.29 mi. Look for signs: #29 Lower Hulls Gulch. This earns: both Red Cliffs official segments. Section estimate: 1.27 official mi, ~24 min moving, 454 ft climb.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Return via #39 Connector, #39A Kestrel, Connector, Kestrel
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: After Red Cliffs, you are not fully back at the car. Use #39 Connector, #39A Kestrel, Connector, Kestrel back toward Hulls Gulch Trailhead. Expect about 0.46 mi after the final official-credit segment. This return leg is part of the route even though it is not official challenge credit.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Park/start at Dry Creek / Sweet Connie roadside parking
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: Start the GPX before leaving the car. The track should begin and end at this parking point.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Leave car toward Dry Creek Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: From the car, head toward Dry Creek Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Take Dry Creek Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: Follow Dry Creek Trail. This earns: both Dry Creek Trail official segments. Section estimate: 1.32 official mi, 657 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Sheep Camp Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Sheep Camp Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Sheep Camp Trail, turn onto Sheep Camp Trail. This earns: both Sheep Camp Trail official segments. Section estimate: 1.54 official mi, 82 ft climb, 828 ft descent. Next decision: look for signs to Dry Creek Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Bear right onto Dry Creek Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Dry Creek Trail, bear right onto Dry Creek Trail. This earns: Dry Creek Trail segment 3. Section estimate: 0.99 official mi, 132 ft climb, 333 ft descent. Next decision: look for signs to Shingle Creek Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Bear right onto Shingle Creek Trail

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Dry Creek Trail

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Return via Dry Creek, Sweet Connie

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Park/start at Simplot Lodge Parking Area
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: Start the GPX before leaving the car. The track should begin and end at this parking point.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Start on #91 Deer Point
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: From the car, take #91 Deer Point toward Sunshine XC. This access trail/road is part of the route even though it is not official challenge credit. Follow the GPX access line for about 0.36 mi. Watch for signs: #91 Deer Point. Access also follows: North Bogus Shop Road, Bogus Creek Loop, and North Bogus Creek Road.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Take Sunshine XC
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: Follow Sunshine XC. This earns: Sunshine XC segment 1. Section estimate: 0.87 official mi, ~21 min moving, 427 ft climb. ASCENT REQUIRED on Sunshine XC 1. Next decision: look for signs to Deer Point Trail. Connector also uses: Sunshine XC. Connector also uses: Bogus Creek Loop. Connector also uses: #92 Shindig. Connector also uses: #98 Around the Mountain. Connector also uses: #140 Lodge. Connector also uses: #94 Elk Meadows. Connector also uses: #144 Cabin Traverse. Connector also uses: Toll Road.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Deer Point Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Deer Point Trail, turn onto Deer Point Trail. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.59 mi. Look for signs: #92 Shindig. This earns: Deer Point Trail segment 1. Section estimate: 1.14 official mi, ~21 min moving, 74 ft climb, 456 ft descent. Next decision: look for signs to #98 Around the Mountain Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Continue onto #98 Around the Mountain Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Around the Mountain Trail, continue straight onto #98 Around the Mountain Trail. This earns: Around the Mountain Trail segments 1-7. Section estimate: 6.64 official mi, ~142 min moving, 1648 ft climb. ASCENT REQUIRED on Around the Mountain Trail 1, Around the Mountain Trail 2, Around the Mountain Trail 3, Around the Mountain Trail 4, Around the Mountain Trail 5, Around the Mountain Trail 6, and Around the Mountain Trail 7. Next decision: look for signs to The Face Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Continue onto The Face Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with The Face Trail, continue straight onto The Face Trail. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.54 mi. Look for signs: #95 Tempest. This earns: The Face Trail segment 1. Section estimate: 1.15 official mi, ~22 min moving, 77 ft climb, 319 ft descent. Next decision: look for signs to Elk Meadows Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Bear right onto Elk Meadows Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Elk Meadows Trail, bear right onto Elk Meadows Trail. This earns: Elk Meadows Trail segment 1. Section estimate: 0.38 official mi, ~9 min moving, 167 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Elk Meadows Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Elk Meadows Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Elk Meadows Trail, turn onto Elk Meadows Trail. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.23 mi. Look for signs: #144 Cabin Traverse; #93 The Face. This earns: Elk Meadows Trail segment 2. Section estimate: 1.12 official mi, ~23 min moving, 209 ft climb.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Return via #142 Sunshine, Bogus Creek Loop, Elk Meadows, Lodge, Lodge Cat Track, OSM track connector 12046, OSM track connector 8307, OSM track connector 91509, +2 more
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: After Elk Meadows Trail, you are not fully back at the car. Use #142 Sunshine, Bogus Creek Loop, Elk Meadows, Lodge, Lodge Cat Track, OSM track connector 12046, OSM track connector 8307, OSM track connector 91509, +2 more back toward Simplot Lodge Parking Area. Expect about 2.26 mi after the final official-credit segment. This return leg is part of the route even though it is not official challenge credit.
